name: DischargeDisposition
title: Discharge Disposition (2.6 - 1.0.0)
description: Code system of concepts which specify the disposition of the patient at time of discharge (i.e., discharged to home, expired, etc.).  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the PV1 segment.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: Discharged to home or self care (routine discharge)
concept.definition: Discharged to home or self care (routine discharge)

concept.display: Discharged/transferred to another short term general hospital for inpatient care
concept.definition: Discharged/transferred to another short term general hospital for inpatient care
